titleStmt.title: SII 8.340: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 340. (A.R. No. 65 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī .. tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīrācarācatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 2 ṛṣapanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu dvādaśiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷukku rācarāca
vaḷanāṭṭup pācciṟkūṟṟattu kiḻpalāṟṟuk kāricāttaṉkuṟaik kāṇiUṭaiya Oṭamuṭaiyāril kūttaṉ kuṉṟaṉāṉa kiḻāṟṟūr Arayaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Ārampūṇṭāṉum Ivaṉ tampi tāḻiyum viṭaṅkaṉ Uṭaiyāṉāṉa maḻanāṭṭu viḻupparayanāṭāḻvāṉu
m Ivaṉ tampi tiruvaraṅkaṉum perāyiramuṭaiyāṉ Uyyāṉum Ivvaṉaivom nilavilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kāricāttaṉkuṟaiyil Iṟṟaināḷāl viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamum maṉaiyumāvatu . kāricāttaṉkuṟaikku Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai Icaṇaik kuṟai E
llaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Innāyaṉār tevatāṉan tirunāmattukkāṇi Apputikkuṟaikku vaṭakkum ciṟṟāṟṟukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai Apputikuṟai Ellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Āṟṟil niroṭukālukkut teṟkum Āka Icain
ta Innāṉkellai yuḷpaṭṭa nilattāl paṅku panniraṇṭil pollātāṉ celvanāṉa poṉṉimaḻaināṭāḻvāṉum Uṭaiyāṉ nañcuṇṭāṉāṉa neṟkuppai Arayaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭār paṅkāy muṉṉāḷil Innāyaṉār civanāmattāl vilaikoṇṭa paṅku nālum maṇiya
ṉ tevaṉāṉa nāṟaivaḻi coḻappallavaraiyaṉum periyāṉ Ampalavaṉāṉa poṉmalai nāṭāḻvāṉum Uḷḷiṭṭār paṅku nālum Ākap paṅku Eṭṭum nikki Eṅkaḷutāṉa paṅku 4 Ippaṅku nālil Ivvūril Aiyyanār kuṉṟavaḷanāṭarkkuc cikoyilun tirumuṟṟa
mum tirunantavaṉattukkum Eṅka ḷopātiyil nikkiṉa nilam Araimā nikki nikkiniṉṟa paṅkāl vanta nilamum maṉaiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttukkoḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaiporuḷ Aṉṟāṭunaṟkācu 4 1000 Ikkācu nālāyiramum Āvaṇakaḷariyek kāṭṭeṟṟi kaiccelavaṟa
k koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷukkuk kūttaṉ kuṉṟaṉāṉa kiḻāṟṟūrarayaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Ārampūṇṭāṉum Ivaṉ tampi tāḻiyum viṭaṅkaṉ Uṭaiyāṉā
ṉa maḻanāṭṭu viḻupparaiyanāṭāḻvāṉum Ivaṉ tampi tiruvaraṅkaṉum perāyiramuṭaiyāṉ Uyyāṉu mivvaṉaivom . Ippaṅku nālāl vanta nilattukkum maṉaikkum Innilattu meṉokkiṉa maramuṅ kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum maṉṟuṅ kaṉṟunilaipāḻum Āṟu māṟiṭupaṭukaiyum Uṭpa
ṭa Ikkācu nālāyiramume vilaiyāvutākavum Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭcelavolai yāvutākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷmāvaṟitip poruṭcelavolai kāṭṭakkaṭava tallātatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaik kaṟaviṟṟu poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipra
māṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya ṉāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷukku kūttaṉ kuṉṟaṉāṉa kiḻāṟṟūr Arayaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Ārampūṇṭāṉum Ivaṉ tampi tāḻiyum viṭaṅkaṉ Uṭaiyāṉāṉa
maḻanāṭṭu viḻupparaiyanāṭāḻvāṉum Ivaṉ tampi tiruvaraṅkaṉum perāyiramuṭaiyāṉ Uyyāṉum Ivvaṉaivom . Ippaṅku nālukkum Ikkācu nālāyiramume vilaiyāvutākavum Itukku Ivar veṇumeṉṟapote pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭukkakkaṭavomākavum . kuṭutti
lomākil Inta pramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭe pramāṇamāvutākavum . Ippaṭi cammatittu nila vilaippramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvu ṭaiyanāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷukku kūttaṉ kuṉṟaṉāṉa kiḻāṟṟūrarayaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Ārampūṇṭāṉum I
vaṉ tampi tāḻiyum viṭaṅkaṉ Uṭaiyāṉāṉa maḻanāṭṭu viḻupparaiya nāṭāḻvāṉum Ivaṉ tampi tiruvaraṅkaṉum perāyiramuṭaiyāṉ Uyyāṉum Ivvaṉaivom . Ippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭ ṭeḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūr maddhyastaṉ mātāṉamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ pañcaṉetivāṇaṉ kaḻumalaviṭaṅka ṉeḻuttu . I
ppaṭik kivai kūttaṉ kuṉṟaṉāṉa kiḻāṟṟūraraya ṉeḻuttu . Itu viṭaṅkaṉ Uṭaiyāṉāṉa maḻanāṭṭu viḻupparaiyanāṭāḻvāṉ sayiñāṉamaikku Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉam tirunāmattukkāṇik kiḻāṟṟūr pūvālacuntaraviṇṇakar Emperumā
ṉ koyiṟ tiruvaṭippiṭikkum kāśyapaṉ śrikṛṣṇabhaṭṭa niṉṟanampi Eḻuttu . tiruvaraṅkaṉ kaimāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku Ivai Aracamāṇikkapperiya ṉeḻuttu . Itu perāyiramuṭaiyāṉ Uyyāṉ sayiñaiāṉamaikku Ivai kiḻāṟṟūr Arayaṉeḻuttu Ārampūṇṭāṉum
tāḻiyum sayiñaiyāṉamaikku Ivai kkuṭiyāṉa rācentiracoḻamaṅkalattuk kāvaṟkāṇiyuṭaiya perumāḷ Aḻakaṉāṉa maṇavāḷamuttaraya ṉeḻuttu . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ civañāṉakkuṟai Aracūr kemutavaṉ Āḷumpirāṉ poṟkoyilnampi Eḻuttu .
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kkuṟai Aracūrk kavuciyaṉ tillaippirāṉ Āṇṭāṉ cattivaṉapperumā ṉeḻuttu . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tuṟaiyūruṭaiyāṉ vaṭakaraināṭṭu muventaveḷāḷeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ
Digital edition of SII 8.340 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
